name: Classic Spam Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Spam® Lite luncheon meat, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook unpeeled potatoes in boiling water until tender; drain.
2. Cool slightly and peel the potatoes.
3. Cool to room temperature and cut into half-inch cubes.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine luncheon meat, potatoes, carrots, peas, pickles, and onions. Mix well.
5. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, pickle liquid, and mustard.
6. Gently fold the dressing into the luncheon meat mixture.
7. Cover and refrigerate for several hours.
